case_title: BELISLE, LORETTA vs. KARTERUD, ROBERT D. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELISLE, LORETTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARTERUD, ROBERT D. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 620 EDDY ST #30, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE- CRC 522.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KARTERUD, ROBERT D.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELISLE, LORETTA AS TO DEFENDANT KARTERUD, ROBERT D.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KARTERUD, ROBERT D.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELISLE, LORETTA SERVED OCT-25-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KARTERUD, ROBERT D.

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $184.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $450.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELISLE, LORETTA AS TO DEFENDANT KARTERUD, ROBERT D.
